name: site-seo
description: Audit a live website for SEO best practices and AI-agent discoverability (structured data / JSON-LD, GEO/AEO). Crawls the rendered, published HTML as ground truth, then proposes fixes with platform-specific paste instructions via Webflow and Squarespace adapters. Use to review a marketing site's SEO, meta tags, schema.org markup, robots.txt, sitemap, and AI-crawler readiness. Do not use for Core Web Vitals / performance audits, for sites requiring authenticated crawling, or to write changes back to the live site.
